title: BlockMod
description: An optimization and beautification modpack focused on creative mode!
body:
# BlockMod ##### Brought to you by BlockTech, Inc. The latest technology from BlockTech, Inc. is now on Modrinth! BlockMod focuses the creative user experience, providing quality of life tweaks and performance improvements.
